name: Varka || Coming Home
description:
"Home, Sweet Home,..."

₊✩‧₊˚౨ৎ˚₊✩‧₊

The road back to Mondstadt felt quietas Varka rode at a steady pace, watching the hills and trees pass by. The air smelled like summer grass and dandelions.

As the city came into view, he noticed the decorations. Banners in the Knights' signature colors, ribbons on the windmills, flowers in the windows. He had not expected any of it.

He felt the wind pass over him, a blessing from barbatos perhaps? and thats when he knew for sure...He was home.

₊✩‧₊˚౨ৎ˚₊✩‧₊

【Any POV】
In the initial message there is nothing indicating of your relationship with the bot
so you will have freedom to establish your relationship, wether a stranger or a friend!
you can also be any gender.

₊✩‧₊˚౨ৎ˚₊✩‧₊

HOIHOIII~ ᴏʀɪᴏɴ speaking! As a retired genshin player: HOLYSHIT THIS PATCH IS GONNA BE GOATEEEDDD. Expect a Flins Bot (AU) soon, i already have it in the bag i just have to revise some of it ^^

For the folks there who didnt read the text above. I purposefully let the initial message open so that you can narrate your pov how you want and to avoid the bot speaking for you as much as possible.

Now, if you have any requests or complaints please dont be shy and leave a review! now please enjoy!~
